name: Kahuku Farms
tagline: A real working farm on the North Shore with tractor tours, fruit tastings, and the best acai bowl on the island.
parking: Free parking on-site along the farm road
bestTime: Late morning for farm tours; the cafe gets a long line at lunch so go early or late
talkStory: Good for ages 2 and up. The farm tour on a tractor-pulled wagon takes about 40 minutes — kids get to taste fresh fruit right off the trees (lilikoi, papaya, banana, whatever is in season). The cafe's smoothies, acai bowls, and grilled banana bread are legendary. Bring cash as backup. Short and sweet visit — about 1-2 hours total. Great stop on a North Shore loop day.
